name: mineru-open-mcp
description: Parse PDFs, Word docs, PowerPoint files, spreadsheets, and images into Markdown using MinerU's document parsing API.
long_description: MinerU Open MCP connects any MCP-compatible AI client to MinerU's document parsing engine. Convert PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, images, and HTML, xlsx files into clean Markdown. Flash mode works out of the box — free, no sign-up required. Provide a MinerU API token to unlock higher limits and additional output formats.

tools.name: parse_documents
tools.description: Convert PDF, Office, images, and public URLs to Markdown via the MinerU cloud API. Uploads content to mineru.net (do not use for data that must stay on-device); does not modify originals; may write .md under output_dir. Without MINERU_API_TOKEN: Flash mode—Markdown only. With token: higher limits. use get_ocr_languages only to list OCR codes, not to convert files. Parameters: file_sources paths or {"source","pages"} for PDF ranges; language OCR codes;

tools.name: get_ocr_languages
tools.description: Return supported MinerU OCR/script codes (read-only, no uploads). Use before setting language on parse_documents. Do not use for file conversion — call parse_documents instead.

MINERU_API_TOKEN.title: MinerU API Token
MINERU_API_TOKEN.description: API token for full capability — higher page limits. Leave empty to use free Flash mode (lower limits are applied). Get your token at https://mineru.net.

OUTPUT_DIR.title: Output Directory
OUTPUT_DIR.description: Local directory where parsed results are saved (used for batch parsing or oversized content). Defaults to ~/mineru-downloads if not set.
